data.body: FORCE_CLAIM: plan-review gate bypassed by user approval — no plan-review attestation was verified. Reason: "plan remediated over 3 rounds; code approach (inline stamp+sign in _write_event_file, per the design rationale) is uncontested. Remaining blocks are YAML-precision (BRIDGE_BOT_EMAIL fallback in BOTH bridge steps 196+235 — folded into implementation) + a GHA-deploy proving command (operator-attested, can't run the deployed workflow in-repo). The code fix is validated by real RED-first unit tests. Parent 297d PASS+signed.".
